informal_pl: arsinh x = ln(x + √(x²+1)); składa hypot, add, ln. Wymagamy x>0 z powodu chunku 054.
informal_en: arsinh x = ln(x + √(x²+1)); composes hypot, add, ln. Restricted to x>0 by chunk 054's hypothesis.
lean_target_signature: theorem emlterm1_for_arsinh : ∃ t : EMLTerm₁, ∀ x : ℝ, 0 < x → EMLTerm₁.eval x t = Real.arsinh x := by sorry
